commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Keep yourselves from idols. An admonition to the new converted Christians, lest, conversing with heathens and idolaters, they might fall back into the sin of idolatry, which may be the sin unto death here mentioned by St. John. (Witham) _

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: Even an earthly serpent sucks in men at some distance with its breath. Going still further, John says, "My little children, keep yourselves from idols"
